facts: If never spayed or neutered, a female dog, her mate, and their puppies could produce over 66,000 dogs in 6 years!
A dog’s shoulder blades are unattached to the rest of the skeleton to allow greater flexibility for running.
Dogs can suffer from separation anxiety if they are left alone for long periods of time.
Dogs have a very good sense of smell. The part of a dog’s brain that analyses smell is 40 times larger than a human’s and they can smell 1,000 to 10,000 times better than us.
The most popular breed of dog in the US is the Labrador Retriever.
